TANDEM SPREADER BARS

[/et_pb_text][et_pb_text _builder_version=”4.16″ _module_preset=”default” custom_margin=”||14px|||” global_colors_info=”{}”]Flow rigid tandem paraglider spreader bars

EN Certified – shock and load test

Weight approximately 340g[/et_pb_text][/et_pb_column][/et_pb_row][/et_pb_section]
